title: Mellow Earthy Saudi Arabian Potato Stew
description: A one-pot Saudi Arabian dish featuring charlotte potatoes, with an earthy and glassy-jelly texture, cooked in a banana leaf vessel, perfect for a comforting dinner. This recipe is onion and garlic friendly alternative, using other ingredients to bring out the flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cubed potatoes and water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot with a lid, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Prepare the banana leaves by cutting them into large squares and brushing them with water.
Place a portion of the potato stew in the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaves over the stew to form a packet, and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
